description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of brick and wood exterior finishes. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and features a spacious backyard with a green lawn, pool, and outdoor lounge area shaded by a pergola. The front of the house includes a driveway with a car parked, a double garage, and a landscaped entryway with decorative plants and a tall, narrow tree. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard is landscaped with several tall, slender trees and includes a paved patio area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of natural and modern materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, brick and wood exterior, large windows, a fenced yard, pool, and landscaped entryway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the backyard with a pool, green lawn, pergola-covered patio, and several lounge chairs, highlighting the outdoor living space.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side profile of the house, emphasizing the fenced yard, flat roof, and the arrangement of trees and lawn in the backyard.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of the house, featuring the driveway, double garage, main entryway with landscaping, and a car parked outside.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the rear and side of the house, focusing on the pergola, patio area, and the transition between the house and the backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a double garage, paved driveway, landscaped garden, and a covered porch with vertical wood slats and decorative plants.
